title.en: China-to-EU Sodium-ion Battery Storage Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国钠离子电池储能进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鈉離子電池儲能進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China sodium-ion battery storage documentation against EU CE, Battery Regulation, transport, safety, and due-diligence expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国钠离子电池储能文件与欧盟 CE、电池法规、运输、安全和尽责管理要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鈉離子電池儲能文件與歐盟 CE、電池法規、運輸、安全和盡責管理要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current EU product-safety, battery, transport, environmental, grid, and destination-country requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟产品安全、电池、运输、环境、电网及目的国要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟產品安全、電池、運輸、環境、電網及目的國要求。

answer_first.en: Na-ion faces the same EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 obligations as Li-ion, including carbon footprint, due diligence, and battery passport requirements, plus CE and EN IEC 62619 expectations; one upside is easier UN 38.3 transport classification for many Na-ion cells.
answer_first.zh: 钠离子电池面临与锂离子电池相同的欧盟电池法规 2023/1542 义务，包括碳足迹、尽责管理和电池护照要求，并需满足 CE 与 EN IEC 62619 预期；一个优势是许多钠离子电芯的 UN 38.3 运输分类更容易。
answer_first.zht: 鈉離子電池面臨與鋰離子電池相同的歐盟電池法規 2023/1542 義務，包括碳足跡、盡責管理和電池護照要求，並需滿足 CE 與 EN IEC 62619 預期；一個優勢是許多鈉離子電芯的 UN 38.3 運輸分類更容易。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
